etymology.description: е…Җ(е…Җ) (wГ№, "formless or barren") as a phonetic component + иҷ«(иҷ«) (chГіng, "insect") as a semantic component = archaic word for "snake" or mythical venomous snake
etymology.interpretation: The character иҷә (huЗҗ, "snake") combines the phonetic component е…Җ(е…Җ) (wГ№, "formless or barren") to express the sound, with the semantic component иҷ«(иҷ«) (chГіng, "insect") indicating a creature, which together denote a type of snake, commonly associated with mythological venomous snakes in classical texts.
